name: Orange Coconut Peanut Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cereal, nuts, coconut, and orange rind into a large bowl.
2. In a saucepan, mix together the sugar and honey.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture bubbles and boils.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter and rum flavoring.
5. Pour the hot mixture over the cereal mixture and stir to coat all particles evenly.
6. Press the mixture into a greased 8-inch square pan.
7. Allow to cool until firm before cutting into squares.
